title: After the Oka Sho: A Blossoming Smile

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
When the race is over, my heart feels so full it
could burst. Trainer, I'm so happy and grateful
that we met now. I'm so happy that you're my
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You work harder than anyone else in the world,
and I'm glad I can tell you just how wonderful you
are in this very moment.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm not afraid at all to keep moving ahead, as
long as I'm together with you! Now let's get ready
to take on the Japanese Oaks!
